case_title: COLUMBIA MALL, INC. VS. GEORGIOU RETAIL STORES

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT; NOTICE OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF COLUMBIA MALL, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT GEORGIOU RETAIL STORES JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT ON SISTER-STATE JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF COLUMBIA MALL, INC.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF COLUMBIA MALL, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GEORGIOU RETAIL STORES $36,069.42 PRINCIPAL, $2,756.52 INTEREST, $206.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $39,031.94, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
